title: premna coriacea var. coriacea
intro: Premna coriacea var. coriacea, also known as the 'Tongkat Ali', is a plant species in the mint family that is native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fatigue, improving exercise performance, and enhancing overall well-being. Tongkat Ali is often prepared as a herbal supplement in the form of capsules or extracts, as well as being consumed as a tea or added to traditional remedies.
